articles.title: Bond bull market may pause but is far from over: Expert
articles.summary: The benchmark 10-year government-security yield remained stuck in 8-7.5 percent range through all of 2015 and half of 2016, moving lower to sub-7 percent only when the RBI promised in April to reduce the system's liquidity deficit. The yield may now fall more.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Scope for meaningful rate cuts going ahead: Neelkanth Mishra
articles.summary: Credit Suisse' Neelkanth Mishra expects repo rate to fall to a decade low in the coming quarters. He says that beginning December the market may see a robust and widespread pick-up which may boost indices.

articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Nifty 50 up just 2% in last 2 years. Could a bull run be next amid falling oil prices, easing geopolitical risks?
articles.summary: The Nifty 50 has stagnated with just a 2% return over the last two years. With oil prices dropping and geopolitical tensions easing, experts speculate that a potential bull run could be imminent if economic indicators remain strong.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Advik Laboratories’ rights issue stayed by Delhi High Court
articles.summary: Advik Laboratories has been restrained from progressing with key stages of the rights issue process, including regulatory filings, circulation of offer documents, acceptance of subscriptions, and allotment of shares.

articles.title: Silver price tanks 14% in a week leading to 9% decline in Hindustan Zinc share price. Is worst over for white metal?
articles.summary: Hindustan Zinc shares dropped 4% to ₹531.1 as silver prices continued to decline, impacted by a stronger US dollar and rising bond yields. Silver fell 14% this week, exacerbated by diminished geopolitical tensions and expectations of higher US interest rates affecting investor demand.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Aastha Spintex IPO: Price band set at ₹125-136 per share; check key dates, issue details
articles.summary: Aastha Spintex IPO offers shares at ₹125 to ₹136, open for subscription from June 29 to July 1. The offering allocates shares to QIBs, NIIs, and retail investors, aiming to raise ₹170 crore for acquisitions and working capital.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Silver price crashes over 50% from peak, falls below $60 an ounce; Can MCX silver rate fall below ₹2,00,000 per kg?
articles.summary: Silver prices are now down approximately 53% from that peak. The sharp correction has erased more than half of silver’s value from its all-time high of $121.78 per ounce recorded in January 2026.

articles.summary: Crazy Snacks IPO is a combination of fresh issue of 60 lakh shares and offer for sale (OFS) of 15 lakh shares. With a price band of ₹39 to ₹42 per share, the company wants to raise ₹25.20 crore via the fresh sale of shares.

articles.title: Sterlite Technologies share price jumps 5% on launch of ₹45,450 crore QIP; sets floor price at ₹613.69

articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Stocks to buy: Nagaraj Shetti recommends Ashok Leyland, Mahindra & Mahindra Financial shares to buy in the short-term
articles.summary: The Indian stock market showed gains on Thursday, supported by declining crude oil prices. The Nifty 50 rose 0.70% and the BSE Sensex went up 0.68%. While realty and auto sectors performed well, metal and media stocks faced profit-booking pressure.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: FPIs sell ₹63,450 crore of Indian equities in June first half; financials, oil & gas stocks see highest outflows
articles.summary: FPI exodus: The Financial Services sector recorded the highest FPI selling during the first half of June, with net outflows of ₹11,263 crore. The Oil, Gas & Consumable Fuels sector followed closely, witnessing outflows of ₹10,488 crore, according to NSDL data.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Vodafone Idea, Motherson Sumi Wiring, YES Bank among most traded stocks on NSE today, 25 June 2026
articles.summary: Vodafone Idea, Motherson Sumi Wiring India, Tata Silver Exchange Traded Fund, Tata Gold Exchange Traded Fund, Nippon India Silver ETF, YES Bank, Suzlon Energy, and IRFC were among the most traded stocks on the NSE.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Aviation stocks fly high: IndiGo, SpiceJet shares jump up to 6% as crude oil prices slip to below pre-US-Iran war levels
articles.summary: Airline shares rose on June 25 as crude oil prices hit new lows, with SpiceJet up 5.5% and InterGlobe Aviation gaining 4.7%. The decline in oil prices, driven by eased supply concerns, improves profit margins for airlines, with forecasts suggesting oil could stabilize around $67 per barrel.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Direct impact of poor rains on inflation and growth is weakening. The indirect hit is harder to ignore.
articles.summary: As monsoon falters due to El Niño, the ripple effects on prices and demand matter more than the direct hit on India's inflation and GDP growth rates.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Stock market holiday: Are BSE and NSE closed for trading tomorrow for Muharram? Check remaining holidays for 2026
articles.summary: The Indian stock market will be closed on June 26 for Muharram, suspending trading on the NSE and BSE. After this holiday, the next market closure is on September 14 for Ganesh Chaturthi, with 16 holidays scheduled for 2026, including weekends.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Waterways Leisure Tourism IPO Day 3: Here's GMP, subscription status, other key details - apply or not?
articles.summary: Waterways Leisure Tourism IPO: Shares of Waterways Leisure Tourism are attracting a modest grey market premium (GMP) in the unofficial market.

articles.title: CSM Technologies IPO Day 2: GMP, subscription status, price band, review, other key details. Should you subscribe?
articles.summary: CSM Technologies IPO price band has been set at ₹107 to ₹113 per share. At the upper-end of the IPO price band, the company aims to raise ₹145.78 crore from the book-building issue, which is entirely a fresh issue of 1.29 crore equity shares.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Multibagger stock HFCL share price hits 5% upper circuit following broader gains on Dalal Street; up 200% in 3 months
articles.summary: HFCL has been among the market's standout performers in recent months. The stock touched a 52-week high of ₹220.10 on June 22, 2026, after recovering sharply from its 52-week low of ₹59.83 recorded in January 2026.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Dalmia Bharat share price gains as Goldman Sachs upgrades to ‘Buy’; sees 17% upside
articles.summary: Dalmia Bharat share price rose nearly 2% after Goldman Sachs upgraded it to a Buy. The target price was revised to ₹2,020, indicating a 17% upside. Concerns exist over energy costs, demand outlook, and capacity additions, but easing tensions in the West Asia conflict support a positive view.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: South Korean AI chip stock SK Hynix share price surges 13% after unveiling $29 billion US listing plan
articles.summary: SK Hynix shares surged nearly 13% after announcing plans to raise $29.4 billion through a US listing, fueling a rally in South Korea's semiconductor sector. Investors anticipate strong AI demand, leading to significant stock price increases over various time frames.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Nifty Auto jumps over 2%; Maruti, TVS Motor, Ashok Leyland, M&M among top gainers. Why are auto stocks rising?
articles.summary: On Thursday morning, major auto stocks, such as Maruti, TVS Motor, Ashok Leyland, Mahindra and Mahindra, Hero MotoCorp, and Eicher Motors, rose more than 2% each.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Delhivery share sale: Logistics stock falls over 2% after Alpha Wave Ventures sells entire 1.93% stake
articles.summary: Alpha Wave Ventures LP sold its entire 1.93% stake in Delhivery in two tranches on June 24. The Delhivery stake sale by Alpha Wave Ventures LP comes a few days after venture capital firm Nexus Venture Partners offloaded its 1.97% stake in Delhivery.
articles.label: BULLISH
